name: Submission Confirmation Page
summary: Success state displayed after a user successfully submits a form or application.
whenToUse: To provide reference number and next steps

structure.success: GoabCallout with success type confirming submission
structure.nextSteps: Clear list of what happens next
structure.contact: How to get help if needed

imports: import { GoabOneColumnLayout, GoabAppHeader, GoabPageBlock, GoabCallout, GoabButton, GoabAppFooter } from '@abgov/react-components';
codeExample.jsx:
const location = useLocation(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const referenceNumber = location.state?.referenceNumber || 'APP-2026-00000'; return ( Thank you. Your application has been received and will be reviewed.

Your reference number

{referenceNumber}

Save this number to check your application status.

What happens next

  1. We will review your application within 5-10 business days.
  2. You will receive an email when a decision is made.
  3. If we need more information, we will contact you.

Need help?

Contact us at support@alberta.ca or call 310-0000.

navigate('/')}>Return to home );

notes: Reference number should be visually prominent and easy to copy
Include email confirmation mention if applicable
Always include a way to get help
